title: Severn, la voix de nos enfants
original_title: Severn, la voix de nos enfants
overview: In 1992, Severn Cullis-Suzuki, then only 12 years old, addressed the world at the United Nations Conference on Sustainable Development. Eighteen years have passed, but little visible progress has been made toward positive change on Earth. Severn spoke again, explaining that despite the ongoing environmental crisis, it is still possible to reverse the trend and move towards respecting biodiversity.
